query: Map the neural circuit mechanisms underlying flexible cognitive control — integrating datasets spanning prefrontal-hippocampal interactions, dopaminergic reward modulation, motor adaptation, and cross-species learning-dependent plasticity — to identify convergent computational mechanisms that could be tested in a single unified experiment.
